title: dampiera incana
intro: Dampiera incana, also known as the hairy dampiera, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dampiera incana include relief from pain, reduction of inflammation, and protection against cell damage, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Dampiera incana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
